title: Tryzz's Better Ruins
description: This mod / datapack adds several custom ruin structures to your world!
body:
# **Tryzz's Better Dungeons**

This Mod / Datapack adds different custom ruins to your world! ✨

Currently, 5 different tower ruins and one house ruin are being added (more are already in the works)
The ruins also includes loot!

![Ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1602f93e32a36fcb797e61cca4e9c323908b4bb.jpeg)
